positive: A mystical, stylized forest scene depicted in a high-contrast woodcut art style. The main subject is a cluster of glowing, bioluminescent mushrooms and stylized woodland fauna, such as delicate fox silhouettes and intertwined roots. The composition must be symmetrical and centrally focused, with clean, bold silhouettes against a deep indigo and forest green background. Use a limited, rich color palette (jewel tones) with selective glowing highlights (neon cyan and gold). The artwork must be perfect for seamless repetition and scalable, print-grade apparel design, emphasizing strong outlines and geometric simplicity. Intricate detail, vector art aesthetic, highly stylized, perfect symmetry.
